I am reaching out to report an incident involving cheating and boosting in Rainbow Six Siege, a game that I truly love. Unfortunately, in high-ranking matches, the presence of cheaters has become increasingly prevalent and it's causing great frustration within the community.

I have come across a specific player who I believe is engaging in cheating activities and boosting other players. Their actions not only compromise the integrity of the game, but they also create an unfair advantage for those involved in the boosting process. This behavior negatively affects the experience for legitimate players who want to engage in competitive and fair gameplay.

I wanted to bring this issue to your attention to ensure that the appropriate measures are taken to investigate and address the situation. I understand that tackling cheating is an ongoing battle, but as a dedicated player and fan of Rainbow Six Siege, it is disheartening to witness these incidents repeatedly.

I am including relevant details such as the player's username, the platform on which I encountered them, and any additional information that might aid in your investigation.
